CustomField.description: Optional Apex class name implementing IIntegrationTemplateExtension. Invoked AFTER body+headers are rendered, BEFORE the HTTP call — typically to add a signature header (Stripe HMAC, AWS SigV4, etc.). Class must be in the running namespace or referenced as namespace.ClassName.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Apex class implementing IIntegrationTemplateExtension. e.g. for HMAC signing.
CustomField.label: Signer Extension Class
